name: unsat_hello_done_to_init
notes: Negative fixture (absorbing-state violation), two faithful witnesses. (1) SMT: Done is absorbing (Init=>Done, Done=>Done); inputs.smt2 over-pins state_next=Init when state=Done; problem+prev+inputs is UNSAT. (2) Runtime: querying the fsm with state=Done forces state_next=Done, which DIFFERS from the forbidden Init. (Pinning state_next as a `given` can't trigger UNSAT under the functionizer fast-path — see unsat_bad_transition.) given holds only the true inputs; expect.forbidden holds the impossible output.
